g.text: Four model delivery patterns for llama.cpp on a single LKE GPU node
Standard nodes run warmup and storage helpers. GPU node runs inference pods.
Benchmark measures warmup/download, server startup, model load, and first request.
JuiceFS stores model bytes as internal chunk objects in its backend bucket; Redis maps /models/model.gguf to those chunks. If Redis metadata is lost, the model path disappears even if chunks remain.
metadata + chunks must persist for rerun cache hits
